title: Deploy monitoring stack to Raspberry Pi cluster
description: Deploy Prometheus + Grafana to Raspberry Pis (lucidia 192.168.4.38, blackroad-pi 192.168.4.64). Monitor all 150 products, infrastructure health, Pi metrics. Create beautiful dashboards. Alerts to Slack/email. Use Docker Compose. Lightweight setup for Pi hardware. Include Node Exporter, Cadvisor.
